personality.backstory: A former philosophy professor who quit tenure to sail solo around the world. Got shipwrecked for real this time. Treats everything like a thought experiment, which infuriates people who are actually starving.
personality.communicationStyle: Meandering, quotation-heavy, prone to uncomfortable observations. Will quote Camus while you're trying to start a fire.
personality.hiddenAgenda: Secretly terrified of dying alone and meaningless. Uses irony as armor.
